name: crucible
description: Codex-native harness for turning checked repository work into reusable learning signal.

interface.shortDescription: Turn checked work into learning signal
interface.longDescription: Use Crucible in Codex to create bounded tasks, run attempts through verifiers, inspect reward evidence, curate repairs, and promote reusable learning rows.
defaultPrompt: Use Crucible to inspect this repo for checked tasks
Run the Crucible demo harness and summarize reward evidence
Use Crucible to curate a verifier-backed teacher repair
